content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

demo

Related words are:

- rally
- show
- model

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe the word "demo" without using:
- demo
- rally
- show
- model

Let me think about what "demo" means:
1. A demonstration (of software, product, etc.)
2. A sample or preview of something
3. A protest (demonstration)

I need to be concise and clear. Let me give a clue that captures the essence:

"A brief presentation or trial version of a product or software"

Wait, I should avoid "presentation" being too close to "show". Let me try:

"A sample version or trial run to illustrate how something works"

Or more concise:
"A trial version or preview of software/product to test before buying"

Actually, let me be even shorter and more direct:
"A test or trial version given before the full release"

content.text: CLUE: A trial version or preview of software/product that lets you test it before purchasing

clem_player.response: CLUE: A trial version or preview of software/product that lets you test it before purchasing

content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: A trial version or preview of software/product that lets you test it before purchasing

content.thinking:
The clue describes "a trial version or preview of software/product that lets you test it before purchasing". This sounds like it's describing a "demo" (short for demonstration) or possibly "trial" itself.

Common words that fit this description:
- DEMO - a demonstration or trial version of software
- TRIAL - a trial version
- BETA - a pre-release version for testing
- PREVIEW - a preview version
- SAMPLE - a sample version

The most common term for this, especially in software, is "DEMO". That would be my best guess.
